# Birken Lofts

> 57 residences within the historic 1905 S. Birkenstein & Sons Building in River North, Chicago.

## Overview

Birken Lofts is a residential development at 401 W. Ontario Street, Chicago, IL 60654, in the River North neighborhood. The project is an adaptive reuse of the historic S. Birkenstein & Sons Building, originally constructed in 1905 as a heavy timber loft building.

The development preserves the building's defining character elements — exposed heavy timber beams, original masonry walls, and distinctive arched window openings — while introducing 57 modern residences designed for contemporary living.

## Developer

Monroe Residential Partners
Website: https://monroeresidential.com

## Location

- Address: 401 W. Ontario Street, Chicago, IL 60654
- Neighborhood: River North
- Coordinates: 41.8935, -87.6388
- Nearby: Chicago & Grand CTA (3 min walk), Magnificent Mile (8 min walk), The Loop (10 min walk), Chicago Riverwalk (5 min walk)

## Residences

- Total units: 57
- Unit sizes: 564–819 square feet
- Bedrooms: 1–2 bedrooms
- Sample units:
  - Unit 108: 1 bed / 1 bath, 564 sqft — Efficient one-bedroom with open living area and exposed timber ceilings.
  - Unit 111: 1 bed / 1 bath, 614 sqft — Spacious one-bedroom featuring arched windows and original brick walls.
  - Unit 202: 2 bed / 2 bath, 819 sqft — Corner two-bedroom with dual exposures and heavy timber beams throughout.

## Features & Amenities

- Exposed heavy timber beams and columns (original 1905)
- Historic brick masonry walls
- Distinctive arched window openings with abundant natural light
- In-unit washer and dryer in every residence
- Modern kitchens with contemporary finishes
- Elevator access to all floors
- River North location steps from galleries, dining, and nightlife
- Historic restoration preserving Chicago's architectural legacy

## Timeline

- 2025: Design & Planning — Architectural plans developed honoring the 1905 heritage.
- Early 2026: Permits & Approvals — Historic preservation review and building permits secured.
- October 2026: Construction Begins — Adaptive reuse construction commences.
- October 2027: First Deliveries — Residents move into their new loft homes.

## Contact

To register interest or learn about availability, pricing, and preview opportunities, visit https://birkenlofts.com/#contact
